from flask import Flask, request, render_template_string app = Flask(__name__) @app.route('/submit-feedback', methods=['POST']) def submit_feedback(): feedback = request.form['feedback'] name = request.form['name'] email = request.form['email'] if name and feedback and email: # Save to database or send email # For demonstration purposes, just print to console print(f"Feedback from {name}: {feedback}") template = f'''

Thank You!

Thanks for your feedback, {name}!

{feedback}

''' return render_template_string(template) else: return 'Please fill out all fields', 400 if __name__ == '__main__': app.run(debug=True)
